title: ExoTiiK's Default Pack 16x
description: ExoTiiK's Default Resource Pack (16x16) for Minecraft Java Edition.
body:
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![logoasset1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f93b5d85f7c66abf9d7a1058900bd9dd7ca10fe.png)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![ABOUT!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/492b7af12ffa3ad5ed5f73ecd66c26ad09bda14a.png)
- Re-textured Default Textures
- Pack Resolutions: 16x16
- Only compatible with Minecraft 1.8.9 _(no newer versions will be added)_
- Few custom textures available
- Resource Pack made with Paint.NET
- Experimental Resource Pack _(learning process..)_


![NOTE!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b68dcbaf29da5533f0b396f78ea199b389e545e.png)
- Resource Pack is far from finished and still in process
- The Pack is **claimed** to be an "experimental" Pack as it isn't fully re-textured yet
- Keep in mind this won't be a serious pack with crazy 4k textures etc.
- The Rescource Pack is created and used for learning purposes
- All rights go to Mojang & Microsoft
 
![SCREENS1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2975022994b6ac27e31a2f480cc5ef602239dcdc.png)

- Screenshots made with Lunar Client
- Screenshots made by **[@ExoTiiKMC](https://modrinth.com/user/ExoTiiKMC)**
